label: State/UT name
definition: Standardized state or union territory name

label: Year
notes: GBD uses point estimates for each year

label: Age group
notes: Derived groups: 15–49 and 15–64 computed by aggregation

label: Analysis cause group
possible_values: all_injuries, road, falls, self_harm, drowning, burns, poisoning, violence, other_transport, other_unintentional, other_intentional

label: YLLs (count)
definition: Years of life lost to premature mortality

label: YLD:YLL ratio
definition: Ratio of disability to mortality burden

label: HDBI (z-score)
definition: Hidden disability burden index using z-scores

label: HDBI (rank)
definition: Hidden disability burden index using ranks

label: Productive age DALY fraction (15–49)
definition: Fraction of all-age DALYs in age 15–49

label: Productive age DALY fraction (15–64)
definition: Fraction of all-age DALYs in age 15–64

label: MoRTH state rank
definition: State rank by MoRTH road deaths

label: GBD road DALY rank
definition: State rank by GBD road injury DALYs

label: Rank mismatch (road)
definition: MoRTH rank - GBD road DALY rank
notes: Positive = state ranked higher on deaths than DALYs
